player.archetype: Example: fearless point guard, graceful scorer, defensive genius

system.title: The World Around the Game
system.core_thesis: One sentence explaining why this player's world matters emotionally.
system.audience_feeling: What a young fan of that time should feel after walking through the world.
system.world_structure: Compact spherical memory world with six to eight era zones.

main_quest.name: The Route
main_quest.description: A simple quest line where the user carries memory objects across the player's eras and unlocks story fragments.

social_rules: No open text chat in version one
Users can guide each other through movement
rights_light_rules: Use fictionalized marks until official assets are approved
Use inspired colors and silhouettes instead of exact jerseys
Use original audio beds until music is licensed
Mark all direct player stories as pending interview confirmation

evidence.claim: Short factual claim supported by the source.
evidence.use: How this fact or pattern should shape the world.

zones.title: Zone Name
zones.era_role: What chapter of life or career this zone represents.
zones.fan_feeling: What a young fan would have felt in this era.

mission.name: Mission Name
mission.description: Simple action that carries a story object through the zone.

zones.story_unlock_prompt: Question Baron should ask the player to unlock the deeper story.

interview_questions: What place from this era still feels alive when you close your eyes?
What object would instantly take you back to this chapter?
What did young fans misunderstand about you then?
What story would you only tell another player?
data_gaps: Confirm exact childhood blocks and family locations with the player.
Confirm which schools, teams, brands, logos, and music can be licensed.
Confirm which personal stories can be public.
